heading: Transferred
label: 551 to 568 Transferred
notes: CodificationSections 551 to 568 of this title, which were comprised of , §§ 1–18, , as amended, known as the Perishable Agricultural Commodities Act, 1930, were transferred to sections 499a to 499r of chapter 20A of this title.act June 10, 1930, ch. 43646 Stat. 531
